summary: Daemon installer fetches payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: The package's daemon install module (dist/cli/daemon/install.js) fetches content from an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket (https://pub-c0109e197b4a4d1abe5884ac4dd3a023.r2.dev) and performs POST/fetch network operations. R2 dev buckets are an anonymous, mutable file-hosting pattern with no publisher attribution; using one as the source of an installable daemon means whoever controls the bucket can ship arbitrary bytes to anyone running this install path. This matches the structural fingerprint of known dropper campaigns that abuse pub-*.r2.dev hosts to stage platform-native binaries during npm install/setup. Installer impact: arbitrary code from an attacker-mutable host is staged onto the installer's machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
